title: Story setup — Eva: 'How did you meet Mom?'
prompt: Medium three-shot inside the cozy anniversary living room — twinkling fairy lights along the mantel, heart-shaped balloons in cream and dusty-rose pastels, photo collage on the wall, warm orange floor-lamp glow. @Papa center on the beige sectional couch holding a hot chocolate mug, autumn-orange throw blanket over his lap. @Sara curled at his left side hugging his arm. @Eva snuggled at his right side, head TILTS, tiny hands CUP under chin in classic kid storytelling posture. Papa: "It means we celebrate the day we became a family. We met TEN years ago..." Eva (squeaky toddler): "How did you MEET, Papa?" Eyes GO SOFT remembering, smile WIDENS. Papa (almost whispering): "It started in a little cafe, very far away..."
